full_text:
Yuan Zhong (Zhengfu) 袁忠 (正輔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Zhong (袁忠), styledZhengfu (正輔), was born in Runan. Fled his post during the civil war. Alleged to have been murdered on Cao Cao’s orders, Yuan Zhong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Yuan Zhong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
